messages.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hey there! Well, I could use a little help untangling a shopping situation that’s gotten more complicated than my morning coffee order. I recently bought some home office stuff and hiking gear, but now my company’s calling us back to the office—classic plot twist, right? I’d love to see if I can return just the office items and keep the hiking stuff. Can you help me figure out what to do?
